zh.Over Peover, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring於1404年出生在英國爾奧維 奧福時，她的父親Sir Ranulph Mainwaring41歲，母親Margery Venables35歲。她於1427年與Thomas Fitton在英國爾加福斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年2月25日在英國英格蘭爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring于1404年出生在英国爾奧維 奧福时，她的父亲Sir Ranulph Mainwaring41岁，母亲Margery Venables35岁。她于1427年与Thomas Fitton在英国爾加福斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年2月25日在英国英格兰爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

nameMeanings.name: "Ellen"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring was born in 1404, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring, was 41 and her mother, Margery Venables, was 35. She married Thomas Fitton in 1427, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 25 February 1482, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring est née en 1404, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margery Venables, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fitton en 1427, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 février 1482, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Helena "Ellen" Mainwaringが1404年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで生まれた時，父Sir Ranulph Mainwaringは41歳，母Margery Venablesは35歳であった。1427年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスでThomas Fittonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年2月25日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring(이)가 1404년 영국 체실르 버 프오버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ranulph Mainwaring(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Venables(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 Thomas Fitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena "Ellen" Mainwaring родилась в 1404 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ranulph Mainwaring было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Venables, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fitton в 1427 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 25 февраля 1482 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.
